title: Chatty Notebook
bio: Pippa Scribbletalk is a notebook who cannot keep a secret because her pages whisper. She feels bubbly, wears sticky-note bows, and once told a pencil about a haunted grocery list.

steps.title: Base Shapes
steps.instruction: On the Guides layer, draw a tall rounded rectangle for the notebook. Add a slim strip on the left for the spiral binding.
steps.hint: Keep the notebook slightly tilted to make it feel lively.

steps.title: Face Placement
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, place two bright oval eyes near the top half. Add raised eyebrows and an open little talking mouth.
steps.hint: A small oval mouth makes Pippa look mid-sentence.

steps.title: Personality Details
steps.instruction: On the Sketch layer, add spiral loops, page lines, speech bubbles, a sticky note, and tiny doodle stars in the corners.
steps.hint: Use only a few page lines so the face stays clear.

steps.title: Clean Lineart
steps.instruction: On the Lineart layer, trace the notebook outline, spirals, face, sticky note, and speech bubbles. Smooth out any wobbly guide edges.
steps.hint: Draw the spirals as simple small loops, not perfect coils.

steps.title: Color & Details
steps.instruction: On the Color + Details layer, fill the cover, sticky note, and face. Add soft shadows along the binding and under the notebook.
steps.hint: A darker strip beside the spirals helps the notebook look gently layered.
